name: Claudia Sheinbaum
title: President of Mexico

scandals: Perceived as continuation of AMLO's policies

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Trade tensions and immigration policy friction along shared border
Left-leaning Latin American solidarity and shared development goals

biography: Claudia Sheinbaum, a climate scientist turned politician, became Mexico's first female president after serving as head of government of Mexico City. A protégé of Andrés Manuel López Obrador, she combines academic rigor with progressive populism. Her INTJ temperament drives methodical policy planning, particularly in energy transition and social programs, while navigating the complex power dynamics between state institutions, cartels, and the influential MORENA party apparatus.
